title: Login issue
description: User is unable to log into the system even after multiple attempts and password reset. The system shows invalid credentials error.

title: Payment failed
description: Customer transaction fails during checkout process even though sufficient balance is available.

title: UI bug on dashboard
description: Dashboard layout is broken where cards are misaligned and overlapping.

title: Password reset not working
description: Password reset email is not being received by users.

title: Slow website loading
description: Website pages are taking unusually long time to load.

title: Account suspended
description: User account has been suspended mistakenly by the system.

title: Email not sending
description: SMTP configuration failure is preventing system emails.

title: Mobile responsive issue
description: Website layout breaks on mobile devices.

title: Data not syncing
description: API synchronization between services is failing.

title: Notification delay
description: Push notifications are delayed significantly.

title: Profile update error
description: Users are unable to update their profile information.

title: Search not working
description: Search functionality returns empty results.

title: File upload error
description: Users cannot upload images or documents.

title: Chat not loading
description: Real-time chat feature fails to load.

title: Broken link on homepage
description: Footer link returns a 404 error.

title: Security alert false positive
description: System incorrectly flags safe activity.

title: Invoice not generated
description: Billing system fails to generate invoice.

title: Dark mode issue
description: Dark mode does not apply properly.

title: API timeout error
description: API requests frequently timeout.

title: Logout issue
description: Users remain logged in after logout.
